turns.text: What are the distinct forms of government in the continent of Africa?

turns.query: SELECT DISTINCT GovernmentForm FROM country WHERE Continent  =  "Africa"
turns.predict: SELECT DISTINCT GovernmentForm FROM country WHERE Continent = 'Africa'

turns.text: How many are there?

turns.query: SELECT count(DISTINCT GovernmentForm) FROM country WHERE Continent  =  "Africa"
turns.predict: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT GovernmentForm) FROM country WHERE Continent = 'Africa'

turns.text: Show me all the information about the Italian TV Channels.

turns.query: SELECT * FROM TV_Channel WHERE Country = "Italy"
turns.predict: SELECT * FROM TV_Channel WHERE Country = 'Italy';

turns.text: How about the Polish TV Channels?

turns.query: SELECT * FROM TV_Channel WHERE Country = "Poland"
turns.predict: SELECT * FROM TV_Channel WHERE Country = 'Poland';

turns.text: Which country has the most of TV Channels? List the country and number of TV Channels it has.

turns.query: SELECT Country ,  count(*) FROM TV_Channel GROUP BY Country ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
turns.predict: SELECT Country, COUNT(*) FROM TV_Channel GROUP BY Country ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: Tell me the TV Channel of the cartoon titled "The Eyes of Despero!".

turns.query: SELECT Channel FROM Cartoon WHERE Title = "The Eyes of Despero!"
turns.predict: SELECT Channel FROM Cartoon WHERE Title = 'The Eyes of Despero!';

turns.text: How about this channel's series name?

turns.query: SELECT series_name FROM TV_Channel WHERE id IN (SELECT Channel FROM Cartoon WHERE Title = "The Eyes of Despero!")
turns.predict: SELECT series_name FROM TV_Channel WHERE id = (SELECT Channel FROM Cartoon WHERE Title = 'The Eyes of Despero!');

turns.text: Tell me the number of different series names and contents in the TV Channel table.

turns.query: SELECT count(DISTINCT series_name) ,  count(DISTINCT content) FROM TV_Channel
turns.predict: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT series_name), COUNT(DISTINCT Content) FROM TV_Channel;

turns.text: Tell me the package option for the series named "Rock TV".

turns.query: SELECT Package_Option FROM TV_Channel WHERE series_name = "Rock TV"
turns.predict: SELECT Package_Option FROM TV_Channel WHERE series_name = 'Rock TV'

turns.text: tell me the language of this series.

turns.query: SELECT Language FROM TV_Channel WHERE series_name = "Rock TV"
turns.predict: SELECT Language FROM TV_Channel WHERE series_name = 'Rock TV'

turns.text: List the language used least number of TV Channel. List language and number of TV Channel.

turns.query: SELECT LANGUAGE ,  count(*) FROM TV_Channel GROUP BY LANGUAGE ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1
turns.predict: SELECT Language, COUNT(*) AS number_of_TV_Channel FROM TV_Channel GROUP BY Language HAVING COUNT(*) = (SELECT MIN(cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM TV_Channel GROUP BY Language) AS sub);

turns.text: Tell me the author of the cartoon "The Rise of the Blue Beetle!"

turns.query: SELECT Written_by FROM Cartoon WHERE Title = "The Rise of the Blue Beetle!"
turns.predict: SELECT Written_by FROM Cartoon WHERE Title = 'The Rise of the Blue Beetle!';

turns.text: How about its director?

turns.query: SELECT Directed_by FROM Cartoon WHERE Title = "The Rise of the Blue Beetle!"
turns.predict: SELECT Directed_by FROM Cartoon WHERE Title = 'The Rise of the Blue Beetle!';

turns.text: What is its TV Channel?

turns.query: SELECT T1.series_name FROM TV_Channel AS T1 JOIN Cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel WHERE T2.Title = "The Rise of the Blue Beetle!"
turns.predict: SELECT Channel FROM Cartoon WHERE Title = 'The Rise of the Blue Beetle!';

turns.text: tell me the country of the TV Channel for the series named "Sky Radio".

turns.query: SELECT Country FROM TV_Channel WHERE series_name = "Sky Radio"
turns.predict: SELECT Country FROM TV_Channel WHERE series_name = 'Sky Radio';

turns.text: How about its content?

turns.query: SELECT Content FROM TV_Channel WHERE series_name = "Sky Radio"
turns.predict: SELECT Content FROM TV_Channel WHERE series_name = 'Sky Radio';

turns.text: I want to know the title of all Cartoons showed on TV Channel with series name "Sky Radio".

turns.query: SELECT T2.Title FROM TV_Channel AS T1 JOIN Cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel WHERE T1.series_name = "Sky Radio"
turns.predict: SELECT Title FROM Cartoon WHERE Channel = 'Sky Radio';

turns.text: What is the birth date of each poker player?

turns.query: SELECT T1.Birth_Date FROM people AS T1 JOIN poker_player AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID
turns.predict: SELECT people.Birth_Date FROM people JOIN poker_player ON people.People_ID = poker_player.People_ID;

turns.text: Sort the list by the poker player's earnings.

turns.query: SELECT T1.Birth_Date FROM people AS T1 JOIN poker_player AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID ORDER BY T2.Earnings
turns.predict: SELECT people.Birth_Date FROM people JOIN poker_player ON people.People_ID = poker_player.People_ID ORDER BY poker_player.Earnings;

turns.text: Give me the result for the player with the lowest earnings.

turns.query: SELECT T1.Birth_Date FROM people AS T1 JOIN poker_player AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID ORDER BY T2.Earnings ASC LIMIT 1
turns.predict: SELECT people.Birth_Date FROM people JOIN poker_player ON people.People_ID = poker_player.People_ID ORDER BY poker_player.Earnings LIMIT 1;
